steps.title: Public preview boundary
steps.learner_task: Name what this public preview can and cannot claim
steps.handoff_signal: Reader can repeat no patient data and not for clinical use
steps.next_evidence: owner reviewed public wording before any external route

steps.title: Sandbox readiness question
steps.learner_task: Turn a sandbox idea into a readiness question
steps.handoff_signal: Question asks for governance, review role, and evidence
steps.next_evidence: source checked route details before any application language

steps.title: Source support gate
steps.learner_task: Separate citation presence from source support
steps.handoff_signal: Reader can identify missing support without scoring a model
steps.next_evidence: SourceCheckup row linked to a claim specific review question

steps.title: Clinician review handoff
steps.learner_task: Assign clinician review before any practical use language
steps.handoff_signal: Reader can state why local pass is not clinical validation
steps.next_evidence: named human review role after owner clearance

steps.title: Public wording repair
steps.learner_task: Rewrite unsafe public wording into bounded preview wording
steps.handoff_signal: Wording removes access, approval, partner, and endorsement claims
steps.next_evidence: wording decision log before external use

steps.title: Next action gate
steps.learner_task: Choose the next safe public build without outreach
steps.handoff_signal: Next action is documentation or validation only
steps.next_evidence: explicit owner decision before contact, terms, payment, or submission
